description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The Resilience Fund (RF) is a self-insurance instrument fully controlled by Sky Governance, which will cover legal defense expenses in case of legal or regulatory action against Sky or active participants in the Sky Ecosystem. The RF will be the primary source for direct legal defense funding. The conditions of use are defined in [A.2.
